scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix worker run lint
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix worker run build
scripts.test: node scripts/check-login-theme-shell.mjs && node scripts/check-admin-recovery-flow.mjs && node scripts/check-cloudflare-deploy-onboarding.mjs && node scripts/check-supabase-grouped-migrations.mjs && node scripts/check-live-viewer-ttl.mjs && node scripts/check-mini-ping-toggle.mjs && node scripts/check-instance-chart-range.mjs && node scripts/check-website-monitor-period-loading.mjs && node scripts/check-ping-chart-failed-series.mjs && node scripts/check-theme-active-default.mjs && node scripts/check-backup-restore-safeupdate.mjs && node scripts/check-region-count-country.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-ws-query-token.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-install-token-persistence.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-website-probes.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-website-primary-fallback.mjs && node scripts/check-agent-website-public-results.mjs && node scripts/check-public-website-order.mjs && node scripts/check-admin-client-reorder-snapshot.mjs && node scripts/check-admin-website-reorder-order.mjs && node scripts/check-admin-websites-mobile-cards.mjs && cd agent && go test ./...
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test

SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase 项目的 Project URL，例如 `https://PROJECT_REF.supabase.co`。在 Supabase Project Settings -> API 里复制。

SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.description: Supabase 的 secret/service_role key，不要填 anon key。

JWT_SECRET.description: 后台登录会话签名密钥。建议使用至少 32 个字符的随机字符串。
